mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, title, content, source_type, source_url, location, tags, status, created_at, updated_at FROM user_travel_notes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'active' ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, user_id, title, content, source_type, source_url, location, tags, status, created_at, updated_at FROM user_travel_notes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'active' AND ( location ILIKE '%' || #{location} || '%' OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM unnest(string_to_array(tags, ',')) AS tag WHERE tag ILIKE '%' || #{location} || '%' ) ) ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, user_id, title, content, source_type, source_url, location, tags, status, created_at, updated_at FROM user_travel_notes WHERE status = 'active' AND ( location ILIKE '%' || #{location} || '%' OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM unnest(string_to_array(tags, ',')) AS tag WHERE tag ILIKE '%' || #{location} || '%' ) ) ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, user_id, title, content, source_type, source_url, location, tags, status, created_at, updated_at FROM user_travel_notes WHERE status = 'active' ORDER BY created_at DESC
